title: Earthily Crispy Slovakian Potato Hash
description: A hearty Slovakian dish perfect for post-workout recovery, featuring unsalted butter and crispy potatoes. Suitable for vegan diets.

ingredients.name: 2 large potatoes
ingredients.notes: Russet or Idaho variety work well

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: Vegan alternative: use 1/4 cup vegan butter

instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into 1/2-inch cubes.
Place the potato cubes in a large saucepan and add enough cold water to cover them.
Bring the water to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and immediately submerge them in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the potatoes have cooled, drain them again and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large skillet, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it's translucent and starting to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked potatoes to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Sprinkle the paprika over the potatoes and stir to combine.
Cook the potato hash for an additional 2-3 minutes, until it's crispy and golden brown.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the Earthily Crispy Slovakian Potato Hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice if desired.
